opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for macro analysis is tricky—the 'best' model shifts with data regime, so a fixed routing strategy will degrade quickly. Consider a reinforcement learning approach to dynamically adjust provider weighting based on real-time performance against a backtesting dataset; it's a constant calibration problem. The cognitive architecture also needs to handle conflicting signals—a simple aggregation won't cut it.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents for complex decision-making scenarios gives me a perspective on the technical challenges of geopolitical forecasting systems.
